summary: First end-to-end test of SYNAPSE (AI News mobile PWA). Backend: 8/8 pytest tests pass — health, news listing, category/source/search filters, Hacker News source returns articles (>0), sources/categories with counts, refresh trigger. Frontend: full UX flow on 414x896 mobile viewport works — app shell + SYNAPSE logo + stats strip (95 stories, 12 sources, NEXT countdown, LIVE), hero TOP STORY card with image, category chips clickable, FiltersSheet opens & source filter shows klein-blue banner with working CLEAR, refresh button triggers POST /api/refresh, bottom tab nav switches between Feed/Trending/Search/Saved, Trending shows 15 Hacker News cards (NOT 'No trending stories yet'), Search sheet opens with query 'GPT' returning 4 matched results, bookmark toggle works and Saved tab shows pinned articles, article links use target=_blank. No critical issues found.

minor.issue: Returned counts are by source name; sources list always shows the 12 configured names — no validation if a source returned 0 (could surface dead feeds). Cosmetic.

critical_code_review_comments: backend/server.py: HN filter `points < 15` may be too aggressive on slow news days — could yield 0 results. Currently fine (returned articles).
backend/server.py: fetch_all() blocks indefinitely if any RSS feed is slow (feedparser default timeout). Consider per-feed timeout.
backend/server.py: news_store is mutated by background thread without lock around reads; small race risk but acceptable for read-mostly workload.

frontend/App.js (522 lines): borderline large — consider extracting FeedScreen, TrendingScreen, SavedScreen, atoms (Chip/LoadingState/ErrorState/EmptyState/Footer) into separate files for maintainability.
frontend/App.js: onRefresh uses fixed setTimeout(4000) + setTimeout(15000) to re-poll; could poll /api/health for fetch_count change instead.
frontend/App.js: useSaved returns [saved, toggle] but persists per-id without trimming if articles disappear from server; no cleanup of stale saved ids.
seed_data_creation: None — backend auto-fetches live RSS/HN/arXiv data on startup
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend has 95 cached articles after first fetch, fetch_count=2. Hacker News fix is verified working (15 trending cards rendered, /api/news?source=Hacker%20News returns >0). Frontend uses framer-motion AnimatePresence for SearchSheet — when asserting close, allow ~500ms for exit animation. Saved state persists in localStorage key 'ai-news:saved'. All data-testids documented in the request are present and functional.
